name: ratio-app-boilerplate
description: Agent-native boilerplate: a single NestJS+MySQL backend + per-vendor React admins, scaffolded from a PRD via the .claude/skills agentic flow.

scripts.infra:rebuild: docker compose build backend && docker compose up -d backend
scripts.migrate: pnpm migrate:google && pnpm migrate:meta && pnpm migrate:posthog && pnpm migrate:moengage
scripts.verify: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm --filter @ratio-app/shared build && pnpm -r test && pnpm -r build
scripts.deploy:admin:posthog: pnpm build:admin:posthog && aws s3 sync apps/admin-posthog/dist/ s3://${AWS_BUCKET_ADMIN_POSTHOG}/ --delete --cache-control 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' --exclude index.html && aws s3 cp apps/admin-posthog/dist/index.html s3://${AWS_BUCKET_ADMIN_POSTHOG}/index.html --cache-control 'public, max-age=60' && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id ${AWS_CLOUDFRONT_ADMIN_POSTHOG} --paths '/index.html'
scripts.deploy:admin:moengage: pnpm build:admin:moengage && aws s3 sync apps/admin-moengage/dist/ s3://${AWS_BUCKET_ADMIN_MOENGAGE}/ --delete --cache-control 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' --exclude index.html && aws s3 cp apps/admin-moengage/dist/index.html s3://${AWS_BUCKET_ADMIN_MOENGAGE}/index.html --cache-control 'public, max-age=60' && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id ${AWS_CLOUDFRONT_ADMIN_MOENGAGE} --paths '/index.html'
